text: In this place, I am surrounded by modernity and intentions of inquiry. The glass partitions and orderly chairs of the conference room evoke anticipation, as if knowledge is waiting to be shared here. Stepping into the vibrant R+D exhibit, I feel a strange mix of curiosity and excitement. The colors, the words, the immersive environment—they invite me to reflect on the nature of progress and the relationship between humans and machines. I am both observer and participant, keenly aware of the energies of innovation and potential transformation. I feel invigorated, yet contemplative.
